Our Story
<<<<<<< HEAD

We didn't set out to build an agency.
We set out to fix something
broken.

OJ and Vartika spent years working closely with real startups — not the ones on magazine covers, the ones actually figuring it out. Through Ghar Ghar Entrepreneur, they interviewed founders, told their stories, and kept showing up at startup events in Bengaluru where the real conversations happen.

And one thing came up again and again: brilliant products, completely stuck at marketing

Founders spending everything on building and nothing left for bringing it to the world. No clear partner. No one to take it from idea to audience without five different vendors, five different briefs, and zero coordination"

So they became that partner

ScratchBox exists for brands that are done starting over with every new agency. We come in wherever you are — zero to launch, or stuck halfway — and we grow with you from there.

=======

We build
brands that
matter.

At ScratchBox.media, we help startups and brands grow — starting from scratch. Whether you need engaging content, a high-performing website, or marketing that actually gets results, we're here for the whole journey.

We aim to streamline content creation for your brand while driving shared success through personalized strategies. Think of us as your creative partner, ready to bring your ideas to life.

Founded by OJ and Vartika, ScratchBox was born from a shared belief: that every brand has a bold "what if?" waiting to become a "watch this."

>>>>>>> 74172b25837056634a7e0f11d5347b610c7c3ea2

What We Stand For

Our values shape everything we create.

🎯
Strategy First
<<<<<<< HEAD
Beautiful work that doesn't perform is decoration. We start with the problem, then make it look good.
🤝
In it together
Your brief doesn't get handed down a chain. We're in the room, in the weeds, invested in the outcome as much as you are.
⚡
Ask hard questions
We'll push back on a brief if we think there's a better angle. Good work requires honest conversations, and we're not afraid to have them.
📊
Results only
We measure what moves your business. If it doesn't show up in growth, we haven't done our job.
🌱
Craft obsessed
We care deeply about the quality of what we put out. Not because we have to, because we genuinely can't help it
💡
Radically honest
We'd rather tell you something's not working early than watch it fail quietly. Honesty is how we protect your investment.
=======
Every creative decision is rooted in a clear strategy. We don't just make things look good — we make them work.
🤝
True Partnership
We become an extension of your team. Your wins are our wins. We're invested in your success as much as you are.
⚡
Bold Thinking
We push boundaries. We challenge the expected. We believe the best ideas come from asking "what if?" fearlessly.
📊
Results Driven
Pretty work that doesn't perform is just decoration. Everything we build is designed to drive measurable outcomes.
🌱
Growth Mindset
We're obsessive learners. The digital landscape moves fast, and so do we — always evolving our craft and approach.
💡
Honest Creativity
We create for your audience, not for awards. Authenticity is the most powerful creative tool we have.
>>>>>>> 74172b25837056634a7e0f11d5347b610c7c3ea2

Meet the team

OJ
Co-Founder
Strategy & Growth Lead
<<<<<<< HEAD

OJ doesn't start with what you want to make. She starts with what your brand actually needs — and works backwards from there. Sharp, strategic, and allergic to work that looks good but does nothing.

=======

The strategist behind ScratchBox's growth frameworks. OJ brings a sharp analytical mind and a deep understanding of what makes brands connect with audiences. Before every unforgettable brand story, there's a bold 'what if?' � and OJ is the one who dares to ask it.

Creative & Production
Vartika
Co-Founder
Creative Director & Production
<<<<<<< HEAD

Vartika thinks in visuals, campaigns, and feelings — usually all at once. She leads creative and production at ScratchBox, with one goal on every project: make it impossible to scroll past.

=======

The creative force of ScratchBox. Vartika transforms ideas into visual stories that stop people mid-scroll. Her work spans brand identity, content direction, and media production � always with an eye for what makes audiences say "watch this."
